name: Decorative Potted Plant: "Budding Fragrance"
description: A decorative potted plant found within the Temple of Space, notable for its unusual form, featuring delicate blossoms that grow from within the pages of a book.\nUsing Paimon's description as a guide, Tubby was able to reproduce the planter's outward appearance. As for where the flowers' roots truly take hold and how they draw nourishment, that remains a mystery...
